constraints.coverage_assumption: The user wants a citation-genealogy answer covering only the three named papers; BERT and Adam are present in the corpus but out of scope for this question.
constraints.source_constraint: Use only the five papers available in the corpus

task.object: two-hop architecture lineage through GPT-3, GPT-2, and Attention Is All You Need

entities: Hop 1 technical meaning: architecture carried from GPT-2 into GPT-3
Hop 2 edge: GPT-2 cites Attention Is All You Need
Hop 2 technical meaning: Transformer components used in GPT-2
Explicit absence of a direct GPT-3→Transformer citation for the same content
normalized_question: Build a two-hop architecture lineage GPT-3 → GPT-2 → Attention Is All You Need using only the five papers in the corpus, stating what each hop establishes and explicitly not claiming a direct GPT-3→Transformer citation.

obligations.description: Does the GPT-3 paper (gpt3_2020) cite GPT-2 (gpt2_2019) as an architectural predecessor, and what architecture-related content is attributed?
Does the GPT-2 paper (gpt2_2019) cite Attention Is All You Need (attention_is_all_you_need_2017) as the origin of the Transformer architecture used in GPT-2?

raw_question: Using only the available papers, build the two-hop architecture chain from GPT-3 through GPT-2 to Attention Is All You Need. State what each hop establishes and do not invent a direct GPT-3-to-Transformer citation.
